title: Irish Spicy Stir Fry
description: A spicy twist on the traditional Irish potato dish. This stir fry is quick, easy, and packed with flavor. Serve as a side dish or add your favorite protein for a hearty meal.
instructions: Heat the vegan oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Add the spicy stir and silky stir sauces to the skillet and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
